SL_Material_Funding.description: Customer Funded Contestable Works: All other works required.

LandInterestGuidelines.description: Land Interests as specified in the Land Interest Guidelines (“LIG”) are required for this project.

RequiredEasements.description: Land Interests as specified in the Land Interest Guidelines (“LIG”) are required for this project.

PropertyAccessConditions.description: No specific conditions regarding access to private property or the creation of right-of-ways for Endeavour Energy assets are mentioned.

HV Infrastructure Funding and Materials.description: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

Preferred Payment Method.description: EFT is the primary method for payment.

Mandatory Transaction References.description: Unique alphanumeric reference code ARP4983A2 must be quoted in the EFT transaction field.

Document Remittance and Restriction Requ.description: Email remittance copies to remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au. Credit cards and cheques are not accepted.

Capture Invoice Policy.description: A formal Tax Invoice will be provided following the receipt of payment.

LV Works.description: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive.
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive.

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules.
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005.

Service Connections.description: Locate the General section regarding the 'New OH road crossing service connection' intended to maintain existing services.

items.item_description: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11

items.funding_category: reimbursements to be paid to Endeavour Energy by Customer
